conn_id.description: Airflow connection ID for the database.
conn_id.title: Conn Id

table.description: Table the metric is computed over.
table.title: Table

metric.description: SQL expression for the metric, e.g. `COUNT(*)` or `SUM(amount)`.
metric.title: Metric

threshold.description: Max allowed ratio change vs. the comparison period (per `ratio_formula`).
threshold.title: Threshold

date_filter_column.description: Date column used to select each period's rows.
date_filter_column.title: Date Filter Column

days_back.description: How many days back the comparison period is.
days_back.title: Days Back

ratio_formula.description: How the ratio between periods is computed.
ratio_formula.title: Ratio Formula

ignore_zero.description: Ignore rows where the metric is zero.
ignore_zero.title: Ignore Zero

depends_on.description: Steps that must complete before this step runs

trigger_rule.description: Trigger rule for this step (default: all_success)
